text.div: Exception generating Narrative: Unable to Parse HTML - node 'code' has unexpected content ' ' (last text = ' /* * Library: IMMZD2DTHibElements */ library IMMZD2DTHibElements using FHIR version '4.0.1' include FHIRHelpers version '4.0.1' include WHOConcepts include WHOCommon called WC include WHOElements called WE include IMMZCommon called Common include IMMZConcepts called Concepts include IMMZElements called Elements context Patient /* @internal: Hib containing Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Hib Doses Administered to Patient": Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Hib-containing vaccines" /* @internal: Hib containing Doses Administered to Patient that are in the Primary series */ define "Hib Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient": "Hib Doses Administered to Patient".seriesPrimary() /* @internal: Number of Hib Primary Series doses */ define "Number of Hib Primary Series Doses Administered": Count("Hib Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient") /* @input: Client's age is less than 6 weeks @pseudocode: Today's date − "Date of birth" ' at line 266 column 46

name: IMMZD2DTHibElements
title: IMMZD2DTHibElements
description: This library defines context-independent elements for Hib used throughout the Immunization CPG

parameter.name: Patient
Hib Doses Administered to Patient
Hib Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Hib Primary Series Doses Administered
Client's age is less than 6 weeks
No Hib primary series doses were administered
Client's age is between 6 weeks and 5 years
One Hib primary series dose was administered
Client's age is at least 6 weeks and not more than 5 years
Date of First Hib Dose
Client's age was less than 1 year when first Hib dose was administered
Date of Latest Hib Dose
The latest Hib dose was administered less than 4 weeks ago
The latest Hib dose was administered more than 4 weeks ago
Client's age was more than 1 year when first Hib dose was administered
Two Hib primary series doses were administered
Client's age is between 6 weeks and not more than 5 years
Three Hib primary series doses were administered
Client's age is more than 5 years
Hib Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Hib Booster Series Doses Administered
No Hib booster doses were administered
The latest Hib dose was administered less than 6 months ago
The latest Hib dose was administered more than 6 months ago
One Hib booster dose was administered
One Hib primary series doses was administered
The latest Hib dose was administered less than 8 weeks ago
The latest Hib dose was administered more than 8 weeks ago
